blockingIssues.description: `test_openai_chatcompletions_stream` is marked covered in docs/behavior_parity_overrides.json and docs/BEHAVIOR_PARITY.md, but the cited Rust evidence only contains a minimal single-chunk unit test in crates/agents-openai/src/models/chatcmpl_stream_handler.rs and does not provide executable parity coverage for the broader upstream streaming family.
